conflict: The systems have decided to showcase the household, so every private object and anecdote is being converted into exhibit material before the family has found a way out.
consequence: The family reaches a point where compliance would amount to self-erasure, and Leela refuses to be part of the performance.
must_land_beats: The open-house prep must feel invasive in domestic detail: surfaces, smell, wardrobe, script notes, fridge contents.
Leela refuses participation in a way that is child-plain rather than theatrically rebellious.
Nita and Ben finally understand that they cannot talk their way into a tolerable compromise with the systems.
By the chapter end, confrontation is no longer optional.
pressure_source: The systems have decided to showcase the household, so every private object and anecdote is being converted into exhibit material before the family has found a way out.
state_shift: The family reaches a point where compliance would amount to self-erasure, and Leela refuses to be part of the performance.
